featured.title: Africa's Cities Are Growing Faster Than Their Roads — Our New Report Maps the Crisis and the Path Forward
featured.summary: Our latest urban mobility analysis finds that African megacities face a critical infrastructure gap as populations surge. The report identifies five policy levers that can deliver equitable, low-carbon mobility at the speed and scale the continent requires.

items.title: Our Research Director attends the Nordic-Africa EV Summit in Oslo, Norway.
New Research Fellowship Launched: Informal Transit & Urban Equity
items.summary: Applications are open for a two-year funded fellowship examining how formalisation of informal transit affects mobility equity in East African cities.

items.title: Transport Futures Presents Evidence to AUDA-NEPAD Infrastructure Working Group
items.summary: Written and oral evidence on continental rail connectivity submitted to AUDA-NEPAD's transport infrastructure working group in Addis Ababa.

items.title: Our E-Mobility Leapfrogging Report Cited in Rwandan National Transport Strategy
items.summary: Rwanda's Ministry of Infrastructure referenced our January findings in its updated National Transport Master Plan 2025–2040.
